CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(10));
SELECT "between"(value, 'aa', 'ac', false, false, false, false, false) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT "between"(value, 'ab', 'ac', false, false, false, false, false) AS is_between FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT DISTINCT "between"(value, 'a', 'z', false, false, false, false, false) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, value, "between"(value, 'b', 'c', false, false, false, false, false) AS is_between FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE second_table (id INT, ref_id INT);

SELECT a.id, a.value, b.ref_id, "between"(a.value, 'aa', 'ac', false, false, false, false, false) AS between_check FROM test_table a JOIN second_table b ON a.id = b.ref_id WHERE "between"(a.value, 'a', 'd', false, false, false, false, false);
SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN "between"(value, 'aa', 'ac', false, false, false, false, false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_between FROM test_table;
SELECT "between"(MAX(value), 'aa', 'ac', false, false, false, false, false) AS max_between_check FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE range_table (start_value VARCHAR(10), end_value VARCHAR(10));
SELECT a.value, b.start_value, b.end_value, "between"(a.value, b.start_value, b.end_value, false, false, false, false, false) AS in_range FROM test_table a JOIN range_table b ON 1=1;
